demo_timestamps.description: Gamma AR uses augmented reality to overlay design models with the real world.
MatterPort creates digital twins by embedding real-world spatial data into AECO workflows.

themes: Integration of Autodesk products with partner technologies

client_mentions.name: Gamma AR
client_mentions.context: Used augmented reality to combine design world with real world and built integrations with Autodesk technology.

client_mentions.name: MatterPort
client_mentions.context: Creates digital twins and integrates spatial data with Autodesk products.

ai_technologies.name: Forma AI
ai_technologies.context: Technology underpinning Autodesk Forma connecting workflows and data.

summary: The video focuses on the importance of the Autodesk Partner Ecosystem for construction companies, highlighting how partners like Gamma AR and MatterPort use integrations with Autodesk solutions. These partnerships enhance project efficiency by utilizing augmented reality and spatial data, ultimately improving outcomes through collaborative workflows.
